examples: The horror of this, so nakedly terrifying, held them all silent.
The horror of this, so nakedly terrifying, hold them all silent.
Apache warrior reel nakedly on a pony and rush by with a rifle raised.
My next question was not about God or church: it was nakedly about me, and my fears.
Martin sings nakedly about how breakups can feel like the end of the world, or maybe it's about the actual end of the world.
